titleStmt.title: SII 22.395: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 395. (A.R. No. 395 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, TIRUMAYYAM SATYAGIRINĀTHA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL JAṬ. TRIBH. PARĀKARAMA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA 5+7th YEAR

summary.p: The details of date given as [Kumbha], ba. 12, Sunday, Uttirāḍam correspond to A.D. 1369, February 4, according to Kielhorn (Ep. Ind. Vol. IX, p. 225) This recods the sale of the (tenancy) rights over some pieces of land by Śīrāḷadēvar Munaiyadaraiyar Makkaṇayināṉ of Mēlūr in Kāna-nāḍu alias Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu to one Tiruvuḍaiyar Piṟavikkunallār of Kuḷamaṅgalam in Mēlai Iraṇiyamuṭṭa-nāḍu said to be a tiruvuḍaiyāṭṭam of Nāyaṉār Aḻagar, for 200 paṇam, which was the amount he had to pay to the latter as ‘marriage money’ for marrying his sister Kāṇaviniyār. He is stated to have also sold his rights over some other lands for 540 paṇam presumably for meeting the other expense of his marriage like the presentation of aṅgabhūshaṇam to the bride and similar items. These kāṇiyāṭchi lands comprised a tiruviḍaiyāṭṭam land of Nāyaṉār Tirumeyya-Malaiyāḷan, one of Emberumāḷ, and a dēvadāna land of god Piḷḷaiyār of a local shrine. The others belonged to private individuals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tripuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīparākkiṟama pāṇṭiyatevarkku Āṇṭu 5- vatiṉ
Etir 7vatu kumbha nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tuvātaciyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamai yum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ
nāyaṉār Aḻakar tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭamāṉa melai Iraṇiyamuṭṭa nāṭṭu kuḷa maṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvuṭaiyar
piṟavikku nallāṟku kāṉaṉāṭāṉa virutarācapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu melūr cirāḷatevar muṉaiyataraiyar makkaṇāyi
ṉāṉeṉ kāṇiyāṭci vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivar Uṭap piṟanta peṇpiḷai kāṇavi
ṉiyārai nāṉ vivākam paṇṇukaiyil kalliyāṇa Aḻivukku Iṭuvatāṉa paṇam Irunūṟṟukkum kaiyyil
Iṭukaikku mutalillātapaṭiyāle Ippaṇam Irunūṟṟukkum viṟṟa kāṇi yāṭciyāvatu Eṉ viḻukkāṭu nilattil
le viṟṟa nāyaṉār tirumeyya malaiyāḷaṉ tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭam tirumālai mañcattaṭi muṟṟu nilamum Uḷḷūr Em
perumāḷ tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Aṭiyāḷvayakkal taṭimuṟṟu nilamum Uḷḷūṟ piḷḷaiyār tevatāṉam piḷḷaiyār
palippaṟṟāṉavāṉṟu Iraṇiya taṭimuṟṟu nilamum Āka I
m Aṅkapūṣaṇattukku Iṭuvatāṉa nilam pa kku viṟṟappaṭi kuḻi 5 100 4 10 I
viṟṟu hastatukkum viṟṟa kāṇiyāṭciyāvatu Ivvūr Ampalavāṇaṉ kāṇiyāṉa tirukkaivelaḻaki
nallapiḷḷaippeṟṟāḷum varavai Iraṇṭiṉāl Iṟai Iṭṭa taṭi Oṉṟiṉāl viḷai nilamum Inta nilattukku varum
laṅkaḷum Āka Ivvakaippaṭi paṇam Eḻunūṟṟu nāṟpatukkum Inta kāṇiyāṭcikaḷum Innilaṅkaḷuk kurittāṉa mel no
kkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟukaḷum kuḷattil nirum pāciyu maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa camatta prāpttikaḷum viṟṟu vilaipra
māṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta nalla piḷḷaippeṟṟāḷ Uḷpaṭṭa ceyum vuruvi (virivu ?) nilaṅkaḷ tirumeyyar tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭam tirumā
vatiyāḷ vayakkal taṭi Oṉṟup piḷḷaiyār tuṭaval taṭi Oṉṟu koyilppaṟṟu varavai Iraṇṭum Ā
ṉa Uyaṟṟiyum kuḻippaṉa kuḻittum vaippaṉa vaittum kaṭamaippaṟṟāṉa nilattukku Ū
rar kkaṭamai Iṟuttum tevatāṉam tiruvuṭaiyāṭṭam tāyalppaṟṟukku Iṟuppaṉa Iṟuttum peṟu
potuvārākavum ṅkaḷukku Ituve vilaiyolaiyum poruḷcelavoStops with this.
Digital edition of SII 22.395 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
